description: Product Description Kingrol 6 Pack 10oz Wine Glasses Goblets, 300ml Vintage Water Glasses, Romantic Mixed Drink Glasses for Party, Daily Use Set your table with stunning beauty when your use these embossed glass goblets. With a substantial feel in hand, they stand up beautifully to everyday use and can hold a variety of beverages, serving everything from sparkling water to cocktails with ease. Use every day or for those special events where you'd like to add a vintage look. Enjoy the clean look of this drinkware and its stunning texture that will naturally shine in the light and give the liquids it holds a cool look.
